Title: Chaos
Author: Tom O'Neill
column9:
The premise of this book seemed exciting. CIA? LSD? FBI? LAPD?Charles Manson? All involved in a tremendous conspiracy?

However the dead end at the conclusion of the book made me disappointed. The author said that he ended up broke and with his partner leaving him after he wrote this title.

Title: Steve Jobs
Author: Walter Isaacson
column9:
I’ve read this book twice. I read it last year but decided to read it again because I thought it was so good.

Key takeaways: break away from traditional molding, have extreme ownership in anything you do, and be unorthodox.

Title: The Hobbit
Author: J. R. R. Tolkien
column9:
I have read this book four times. Once in middle school, once in high school, once in 2017, and again in 2021. This classic tale never gets old.

Such a wonderful book. I am going to read this to my children.

I give this book 5 out of 5 fat ponies.
